case_title: CLEGHORN, PETER vs. GRUNER, LUDWIG SR et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GRUNER, LUDWIG SR GRUNER, LUDWIG JR

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLEGHORN, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT GRUNER, LUDWIG SR GRUNER, LUDWIG JR
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLEGHORN, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT GRUNER, LUDWIG SR GRUNER, LUDWIG JR SUMMONS ISSUED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GRUNER, LUDWIG SR GRUNER, LUDWIG JR
